# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  GITLAB_USER_EMAIL: "ci@example.com"
  GITLAB_USER_NAME: "CI Bot"

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building the project..."
  after_script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "Merge Request Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        # Add additional commands to handle notifications if needed
      fi

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying the project..."
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://your-production-url.com
  only:
    - master
  tags:
    - $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE
  after_script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" ]; then
        echo "Deployment Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
        # Generate and save release notes
      fi
